creator: peter.jeremy@alcatel-lucent.com.au
text:
Whilst installing firefox-3.5.b4,1, a number of package errors are reported:

[en-US]
bin/chrome/en-US.jar
bin/chrome/en-US.manifest
bin/defaults/pref/firefox-l10n.js
Warning: package error or possible missing or unnecessary file: bin/defaults/existing-profile-defaults.js (packages-static, 18).
bin/browserconfig.properties
..
[xpcom]
bin/libmozjs.so
Warning: package error or possible missing or unnecessary file: bin/libplc4.so (packages-static, 33).
Warning: package error or possible missing or unnecessary file: bin/libplds4.so (packages-static, 34).
bin/libxpcom.so
Warning: package error or possible missing or unnecessary file: bin/libnspr4.so (packages-static, 36).
bin/libxul.so
[browser]
..
bin/components/necko_strconv.xpt
bin/components/necko_viewsource.xpt
Warning: package error or possible missing or unnecessary file: bin/components/necko_wifi.xpt (packages-static, 140).
bin/components/necko.xpt
bin/components/oji.xpt
..
bin/components/nsHandlerService.js
bin/components/nsWebHandlerApp.js
Warning: package error or possible missing or unnecessary file: bin/components/libdbusservice.so (packages-static, 236).
bin/components/aboutRights.js
..
bin/components/nsUrlClassifierLib.js
bin/components/url-classifier.xpt
Warning: package error or possible missing or unnecessary file: bin/components/libmozgnome.so (packages-static, 252).
bin/chrome/browser.jar
..
bin/chrome/pippki.manifest
Warning: package error or possible missing or unnecessary file: bin/libfreebl_32fpu_3.chk (packages-static, 354).
Warning: package error or possible missing or unnecessary file: bin/libfreebl_32fpu_3.so (packages-static, 355).
Warning: package error or possible missing or unnecessary file: bin/libfreebl_32int_3.chk (packages-static, 356).
Warning: package error or possible missing or unnecessary file: bin/libfreebl_32int_3.so (packages-static, 357).
Warning: package error or possible missing or unnecessary file: bin/libfreebl_32int64_3.chk (packages-static, 358).
Warning: package error or possible missing or unnecessary file: bin/libfreebl_32int64_3.so (packages-static, 359).
bin/updater
Warning: package error or possible missing or unnecessary file: bin/crashreporter (packages-static, 367).
Warning: package error or possible missing or unnecessary file: bin/crashreporter.ini (packages-static, 368).
Warning: package error or possible missing or unnecessary file: bin/crashreporter-override.ini (packages-static, 369).
Warning: package error or possible missing or unnecessary file: bin/Throbber-small.gif (packages-static, 370).
Warning: package error or possible missing or unnecessary file: bin/components/libnkgnomevfs.so (packages-static, 374).
/usr/local/bin/perl5.8.9 ../../xpinstall/packager/xptlink.pl -s ../../dist -d ../../dist/xpt -f ../../dist/firefox/components -v -x " /home/obj/usr/ports/www/firefox3-devel/work/mozilla-1.9.1/dist/bin/xpt_link"

In addition, both work/fake/include/firefox3/unstable/system_wrappers and
work/fake/include/firefox3/unstable/system_wrappers_js are created as mode
644 so that attempts to copy files into them fail:
find ../../dist/include -type f -o -type l -exec /home/obj/usr/ports/www/firefox3-devel/work/mozilla-1.9.1/config/nsinstall -t -m 644 {} /home/obj/usr/ports/www/firefox3-devel/work/fake/include/firefox3/unstable \;
/home/obj/usr/ports/www/firefox3-devel/work/mozilla-1.9.1/config/nsinstall: cannot create /home/obj/usr/ports/www/firefox3-devel/work/fake/include/firefox3/unstable/system_wrappers/A4Stuff.h: Permission denied
/home/obj/usr/ports/www/firefox3-devel/work/mozilla-1.9.1/config/nsinstall: cannot create /home/obj/usr/ports/www/firefox3-devel/work/fake/include/firefox3/unstable/system_wrappers_js/A4Stuff.h: Permission denied

There is also a pkgconfig error:
/bin/mkdir -p /home/obj/usr/ports/www/firefox3-devel/work/fake/libdata
/bin/mv -f /home/obj/usr/ports/www/firefox3-devel/work/fake/lib/pkgconfig /home/obj/usr/ports/www/firefox3-devel/work/fake/libdata/ || true
mv: rename /home/obj/usr/ports/www/firefox3-devel/work/fake/lib/pkgconfig to /home/obj/usr/ports/www/firefox3-devel/work/fake/libdata/pkgconfig: No such file or directory
/bin/rm -f /home/obj/usr/ports/www/firefox3-devel/work/fake/lib/pkgconfig

How-To-Repeat: Build/install firefox3-devel and examine install log.
